name: Solo founder with company URL
description: Founder mention plus a fetched company URL. Should produce rich identity with company, role, industry, and at least one domain.

inputs.text: I'm Sarah, founder of Acme. We make AI tools for designers.

url_contents.content: Acme — design tools for the AI era. Founded 2024 in San Francisco. 12-person team. Series A funding led by Sequoia. Our flagship product is a generative design tool that lets designers iterate 10x faster on visual concepts.
